DescribeCacheRules.filters:
Conditional filters (see Appendix: Filter). Multiple filters are AND-combined; multiple values within a filter are OR-combined. Supported fields:
• name=dataSrcId: filter by data source ID, e.g. value=["ds-AOLmxozuEqas", "ds-kykIYfOmY9ZU"];
• name=cacheRuleId: filter by cache rule ID, e.g. value=["cr-HljnqUtZBazs", "cr-3LwVtPjGYPij"];
DescribeCacheRules.filters.name: The field to filter on. Multiple filters are combined with AND logic. Example: zone
DescribeCacheRules.filters.values: The filter values for the field. Multiple values are combined with OR logic. Example: ["zoneA", "zoneB"]
DescribeCacheRules.maxKeys: Maximum number of entries to return. Valid range: [1, 1000]. Default: 100
DescribeCacheRules.marker: Starting position for paginated list retrieval. The returned list is sorted by cacheRuleId in lexicographic order. Set this to the nextMarker value from the previous response
